commit.message:
Fix Vercel build: pass rasterize script via env vars instead of file path

Turbopack was trying to resolve the script file path as a module dependency.
Now the rasterization script is inlined as a string constant and executed via
`node --input-type=module -e`, with file paths passed through environment
variables instead of argv.

commit.message:
feat: add tasteful App Store rating prompt via SKStoreReviewController

Introduce ReviewPromptService that tracks meaningful actions (successful
database unlocks) and requests an App Store review only when appropriate:
- Requires 7+ meaningful actions before first prompt
- Only prompts once per app version
- Enforces a 30-day minimum gap between prompts
- Never prompts during AutoFill flows

Hooked into DatabaseViewModel after both password and biometric unlocks.
Includes 13 unit tests covering action counting, version gating, time
gap enforcement, custom thresholds, and state reset.

commit.message:
Fix PR selection logic to prefer open and recently updated PRs

When multiple PRs share the same commit SHA, the workflow now intelligently
selects the most relevant PR instead of always picking the first one (lowest
number).

New selection priority:
1. Open PRs over closed/merged PRs
2. Most recently updated PR

This fixes ops workflow deployments showing PR #1 instead of the actual PR
where the deployment was triggered (e.g., PR #10).

Files changed:
- .github/workflows/ops.yml: Updated PR lookup in deployment creation
- .github/scripts/update-deployment-wiki.js: Updated PR lookup in wiki generation

commit.message:
fix: modal root must have z-index to appear above layout elements

position:fixed always creates a stacking context, even without z-index.
Without an explicit z-index the root sits at z-index:auto (bottom of the
stacking order), so fixed/sticky layout elements like a sidebar (z-10)
or a sticky header (z-20) paint above the modal overlay.

Set z-index on the root to var(--aark-modal-z, 9999) so it is in sync
with the overlay's own z-index and respects setAarkModalTheme overrides.

Bumps to 1.3.2.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Initial commit: Investment Analysis Platform

A personal investment analysis system that tracks real holdings across
multiple brokerage accounts, fetches live market data, runs technical
and fundamental analysis, and generates actionable reports.

Features:
- Real-time A-share/HK/US market data via Eastmoney, AkShare, OpenBB
- Technical analysis (MA, MACD, RSI, KDJ, Bollinger)
- Portfolio tracking across multiple accounts
- Real-time macro & commodity data (gold, copper, FX)
- News sentiment analysis
- Automated report generation with PDF export

Fix scroll: make main a flex container, use flex-1 instead of h-full

Changed <main> to flex flex-col so height propagates properly via
flex-1 min-h-0 chain instead of relying on h-full (100%).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: remove optimization suggestions from macro profile script

The "Optimization Insights" section suggested actions that were either
already completed (SanelyRuntime extraction, sub-trait caching) or
investigated and found infeasible (cross-expansion caching). The
benchmark script's job is to present numbers clearly, not advise —
leave interpretation to the reader.

Replaced with a simple "Hot Types (>50ms)" summary listing the
slowest types by total time. Also removed `generate_insights` function
and its reference from JSON output.

commit.message:
fix: BingX quote parse — data is array not object

BingX bookTicker returns {"data":[{...}]} but code was reading
d.data.bidPrice (undefined) instead of d.data[0].bidPrice.
This caused all BingX quotes to return bid=0/ask=0, which were
discarded, leaving the scanner with 0 pairs.
Also fix volume field names: bidVolume/askVolume instead of bidQty/askQty.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(epsilon-delta): 完全な歴史ベースのε-δ論法学習システム

全12章構成で350年の数学史を体験できる教材を実装

## 主な機能

### 📚 章構成（合計95分）
- 序章: ガリレオ〜ニュートン（1638-1687）
- 第1章: バークリーの批判（1734）
- 第2章: コーシーの挑戦（1821）
- 第3章: 基礎の整備（1837-1879）
  - 関数の再定義（ディリクレ）
  - 実数の厳密化（デデキント）
  - 集合論（カントール）
  - 記号論理学（フレーゲ）
- 第4章: ワイエルシュトラスの完成（1861）
- 第5章: 実践（1次・2次・3次関数）
- 第6章: 物理法則への応用（伏線回収）

### 🎯 教育工学的特徴
- 動機付け重視（なぜ必要か→どう解決したか）
- 歴史的必然性の理解（時代の前後を明示）
- インタラクティブなε-δゲーム
- 人物カード・用語集・補足説明

### 🎨 UI/UX改善
- 折りたたみ式ホームページ
- ε-δ論法への特集リンク
- 認知負荷理論に基づいた段階的開示
- 両側性の視覚化（絶対値の概念）

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(kpi): reconcile D1 matched_items delta with match_result_json

When LLM matches were applied before match_result_json sync was
deployed, the JSON sum may lag behind D1 matched_items. The KPI
handler now detects this delta and distributes it proportionally
(or all to API if no table matches exist in JSON).

detailedExplanations). The remaining 4 were empty, so the blurred preview

fix: pre-rollout stability audit (#182)

* fix: pre-rollout stability audit — shutdown, singleton, error handling, group logic

- Add graceful shutdown: SessionService.shutdown() unsubscribes all Firestore
  listeners; MythicPlusBot.close() calls it before super().close() (P0)
- Fix Firebase singleton permanently broken state: catch ValueError from
  initialize_app when app already registered (P0)
- Add error handling to all critical Firestore writes in frontend (requestSpin,
  cancelAndReturnToLobby, finishSpinSequence, selectChannel, createGuildEntry,
  announceResults toggle) (P0)
- Fix offhealersToGrab boolean bug: was True/False instead of int count (P1)
- Make lastGroups per-guild to prevent cross-guild group history contamination (P1)
- Add retry with exponential backoff on frontend Firestore listener errors (P1)
- Reset channel to lobby status on spin processing failure (P2)
- Remove dead lastGroups.clear() call (P2)

items max

commit.message:
Add file upload support to EngineGPT chats (images + documents)

Users can now attach images and documents (PDF, Word, TXT, CSV, MD) to
EngineGPT conversations. Images use native vision APIs for both Claude
and Grok. Documents are text-extracted server-side (pdf-parse, mammoth)
and included as context. Attachments are stored in Vercel Blob and
persisted as JSON in the aiMessages table.

commit.message:
Add PnL Sync feature — pull trade history from NinjaTrader per account

- Add "Sync PnL" button to each account row in Trade Copier dashboard
- Add sync_trades to valid command actions whitelist
- Add POST /api/sync-trades endpoint in server.js with deduplication
  (matches trade_id format from CSV import: buyFillId-sellFillId)
- Add sync_trades command handler in NT Add-On that reads Account.Executions
  for last 14 days, pairs buy/sell fills FIFO, and POSTs to API
- Recalculates account balance after import (starting_balance + sum of pnl)
- Safe to click multiple times — duplicates are skipped

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Enhancement: Add success cache query for removal candidate neuron UUIDs (#1715) (#1719)

* Enhancement: Add success cache query for removal candidate neuron UUIDs (#1715)

Add getSuccessfulRemovalNeuronUUIDs() to SuccessCache.ts that scans the
remove-low-impact and remove-neuron subdirectories to extract neuron UUIDs
that have already been proven successful for removal. This provides the
foundation for deprioritising redundant removal candidates.

Includes 6 unit tests covering: empty/non-existent directories, populated
entries, non-removal entry filtering, corrupt entry handling, and
deduplication across directories.

ci: use tsc -b for type check to catch unused imports earlier

Changed from `tsc --noEmit` to `tsc -b` in CI type-check step.
`tsc -b` uses project references and enforces noUnusedLocals from
tsconfig.app.json, catching unused imports at the type-check step
instead of waiting for the build step to fail.
